professional_summary: AI Engineer and Technical Lead with experience in multi-agent orchestration systems, state-driven engines, and full-stack development. Demonstrated leadership as a Co-Founder of a multicultural youth foundation and experience in technical mentorship. Proficient in React, Node.js, and .NET, with a focus on scalable architecture and secure coding.

responsibilities: Collaborated with Product Owner to design 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system
Designed and implemented a state-driven orchestration engine to coordinate 16 specialised agents
Built modular agent services with JSON-based state contracts
Optimised research pipeline using Tavily API, reducing token usage by 60%
Developed QA mechanisms for pipeline output validation
achievements: Successfully eliminated race conditions in multi-step LLM workflows
Improved system throughput through concurrent processing

responsibilities: Delivered structured programming instruction in Melbourne schools
Taught JavaScript, C, Java, and Python to groups of 12-20 students
Provided hands-on debugging and technical problem-solving support
Planned and delivered community programs for 500+ youth
Led the Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference
Facilitated dialogue between youth and elders on mental health
achievements: Achieved 50+ attendees and 4.5/5 satisfaction rating for youth conference

projects.title: NOCODEJAM
projects.description: Full-stack challenge submission and badge system using React, TypeScript, Supabase, and PostgreSQL.

projects.title: Robot Controller
